name: hdfs_datanode
explanation: The HDFS DataNode check fetches metrics from the JMX HTTP servlet at `/jmx` (no JMX-RMI). The DataNode HTTP port defaults to 9864 (Hadoop 3) and the path `/jmx` is universal, so a single HTTP probe against `http://%%host%%:9864/jmx` is enough to discover and validate the endpoint. No authentication is required by default. Classification is generic because the URL is canonical and singular.
notes: Hadoop 2.x uses port 50075 instead of 9864; a discovery layer should probe both. Kerberos-secured clusters would require credentials but the default deployment is open.
